prompt: A high-quality, cinematic portrait of a beautiful young woman with soft, natural makeup and shoulder-length brown hair with bangs, wearing stylish sunglasses on top of her head. She is wearing a fitted black crop top, smiling warmly at the camera. The setting is a scenic tropical beach during the golden hour, with the ocean waves gently washing onto the sand in the background. Soft natural sunlight, realistic skin texture, shallow depth of field, blurred beach background with palm trees, 8k resolution, photorealistic
promptEn: A high-quality, cinematic portrait of a beautiful young woman with soft, natural makeup and shoulder-length brown hair with bangs, wearing stylish sunglasses on top of her head. She is wearing a fitted black crop top, smiling warmly at the camera. promptZh: 一张高质量、电影感十足的人像，拍摄对象是一位美丽的年轻女性，化着柔和自然的妆容，留着 带刘海的棕色齐肩发，头上戴着时尚的太阳镜。她穿着一件 修身黑色短款上衣，正对着镜头温暖地微笑。拍摄地点位于 风景优美的热带海滩，时间为黄金时刻，背景中海浪轻轻拍打着沙滩。柔和的自然光，真实的皮肤纹理，浅景深，模糊的海滩背景衬托着棕榈树，8k 分辨率，照片级真实感
